title: conium divaricatum
intro: Conium divaricatum, also known as giant hemlock or western hemlock, is a plant species native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as relieving coughs and respiratory issues, as well as easing pain and inflammation. Conium divaricatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
